_description: All 105 flags referenced in the v0.19.3 decision tree. Mapped to severity tier, source module, and suggested human action. This is the TREE's flag system — Gus should reconcile with the existing flags_catalog.json naming.
_note_for_gus: The existing flags_catalog.json uses different names (e.g., AUTHORIZATION_REQUIRED vs FLAG_VERIFY_AUTH). This file maps what the tree expects. You decide: adopt tree names, map old names to new, or create aliases. The tree's 5-tier severity hierarchy is: STOP (1) > PENDING (2) > FLAG/REMOVE (3) > ALERT (4) > INFO (5).

severity_tiers.1_STOP: Blocks processing entirely. Cannot proceed. Requires resolution or UTS.
severity_tiers.2_PENDING: Processing paused. Waiting for external input. Has re-entry point.
severity_tiers.3_FLAG: Processing continues but human action required. Includes REMOVE_ (CPT removal).
severity_tiers.4_ALERT: Processing continues. Informational warning for human review.
severity_tiers.5_INFO: Processing continues. Logged for awareness. No action required.

flags.description: Patient age is outside testable range.
flags.human_action: Review age. Under 2 = cannot test. Document and notify provider.

flags.description: Patient cannot be tested (homebound + O2, or other hard block).
flags.human_action: Document reason. Fax UTS if applicable.

flags.description: No valid test options remain after M3 scope filtering.
flags.human_action: Review coverage. Consider cash pay or appeal.

flags.description: All CPTs removed from scope — nothing approvable.
flags.human_action: Contact payer or offer cash pay option.

flags.description: Payer is out of network. Cannot accept.
flags.human_action: Fax UTS to referring provider. Do not schedule.

flags.description: Primary insurance is OON on COB case.
flags.human_action: Check if secondary is in-network. If not, fax UTS.

flags.description: Pediatric patient cannot have HST and no PSG available.
flags.human_action: Verify age and test options. May need pediatric facility referral.

flags.description: Prior diagnostic study is over 5 years old. Hard stop — titration cannot proceed without new diagnostic.
flags.human_action: New diagnostic study required before titration. Contact ordering physician for new diagnostic order.

flags.description: Cannot schedule for any reason (e.g., VirtuOx prefix).
flags.human_action: Document and notify referring provider.

flags.description: Testing not possible — clinical or logistical block.
flags.human_action: Review reason, document, notify provider.

flags.description: Alias for PENDING_INSURANCE.
flags.human_action: Same as PENDING_INSURANCE.

flags.description: No insurance info. Processing as cash with contact flag.
flags.human_action: Contact patient for insurance info. Re-entry at M1C when obtained.

flags.description: Current order not viable (e.g., HST ordered but payer requires PSG).
flags.human_action: Contact physician for new order specifying correct test. Re-entry at M2B.

flags.description: No clinical notes found in document.
flags.human_action: Request notes from referring provider. Re-entry at M2D.

flags.description: Patient approaching 2nd birthday (within 2 months). File processed completely with pediatric codes pre-set (95782/95783, HST NOT allowed). Scheduling BLOCKED until birthday.
flags.human_action: Do not schedule until patient turns 2. System auto-triggers re-entry (REENTRY_RE_AGE2 -> M6_START) on birthday to regenerate output with scheduling unblocked. No reprocessing needed.

flags.description: No physician order found. Clinical pre-assessment done.
flags.human_action: Contact referring provider for order. Re-entry at M2B when received.

flags.description: Prior sleep study results needed but not available.
flags.human_action: Request prior results. Re-entry at M2B when received.

flags.description: Clinical questionnaire data would strengthen case.
flags.human_action: Send questionnaire to patient. Re-entry at M2D.

flags.description: Manual benefit verification needed before proceeding.
flags.human_action: Call payer to verify benefits. Confirm plan type and network.

flags.description: Patient has 100% coverage (Medicaid, Workers Comp).
flags.human_action: No patient cost share. Note in scheduling.

flags.description: Aetna: must check both Evicore AND Availity.
flags.human_action: After Evicore submission, also check Availity for auth status.

flags.description: Order language is unclear about test type.
flags.human_action: Review order. May need physician clarification.

flags.description: Chart notes present but clinical criteria NOT met for authorization. Need additional documentation via sleep questionnaire.
flags.human_action: Call patient to complete sleep questionnaire (Epworth Sleepiness Scale / STOP-BANG). Add results to submission package.

flags.description: Clinical documentation doesn't meet sufficiency criteria.
flags.human_action: Request additional clinical documentation.

flags.description: Multi-payer COB requires manual determination.
flags.human_action: Call both payers to confirm primary/secondary.

flags.description: Multiple comorbidities suggest complex case.
flags.human_action: Flag for clinical review. Consider PSG over HST.

flags.description: Need to contact patient (for insurance, scheduling, etc.).
flags.human_action: Call patient to collect missing information.

flags.description: Payer won't cover the medically necessary test.
flags.human_action: Options: appeal, cash pay, or request different order.

flags.description: Payer criteria not met with available documentation.
flags.human_action: Document gaps. Request additional info or prepare appeal.

flags.description: Signature or referral date is in the future.
flags.human_action: Verify date. Likely data entry error.

flags.description: Patient is homebound.
flags.human_action: HST only option. If O2 also present = STOP_CANNOT_TEST.

flags.description: HPN Medicaid: NOT no-auth. Must submit via portal.
flags.human_action: Submit through Sierra/HPN portal. Request 2 units.

flags.description: Split auth pattern: HST no auth, in-lab needs auth.
flags.human_action: HST: schedule directly. In-lab: submit auth via Availity/fax.

flags.description: Medicare ID does not match MBI format (11 chars, alternating letters/numbers, no 3+ consecutive same type, last 4 = 2 letters + 2 numbers). May be old HICN, MA plan ID, or OCR error.
flags.human_action: Verify Medicare ID with patient. If old HICN format, look up current MBI.

flags.description: Medicaid ID is not 11 digits or contains letters. Not a valid Medicaid ID format.
flags.human_action: Verify ID with patient. Look up in NV Medicaid FFS portal using name+DOB if needed.

flags.description: OCR confidence below 85%. Data may be unreliable.
flags.human_action: Manually review extracted data against source document.

flags.description: Medicare Advantage HMO: PCP referral may be required.
flags.human_action: Verify referral requirement with MA plan.

flags.description: Medicare Advantage IPA routing needs verification.
flags.human_action: Confirm IPA assignment and auth routing.

flags.description: Medicare Advantage may route through Optum.
flags.human_action: Check if auth goes through Optum or direct to plan.

flags.description: Physician signature not detected.
flags.human_action: Check document for signature. If missing, request signed order.

flags.description: Prior results referenced but not available.
flags.human_action: Request prior study results from patient or facility.

flags.description: Alias for FLAG_NEEDS_PRIOR_RESULTS.
flags.human_action: Same as FLAG_NEEDS_PRIOR_RESULTS.

flags.description: BCBS prefix not found in database.
flags.human_action: Call BCBS to verify prefix. Log new prefix for PIN-4.

flags.description: No clinical notes in document.
flags.human_action: Request notes from provider. Cannot assess clinical sufficiency.

flags.description: Chart notes present but quality is poor — single page, checkbox-only, minimal narrative content, or template without patient-specific detail.
flags.human_action: Review notes manually. May be sufficient for some payers but likely insufficient for strict payers (Evicore, NV Medicaid). Consider requesting more complete notes.

flags.description: Chart notes present but appear unsigned — no physician signature, initials, or electronic signature indicator found.
flags.human_action: Request signed copy from physician office. Unsigned notes may be rejected by payers.

flags.description: Provider phone/fax not found.
flags.human_action: Look up provider contact info via NPI registry.

flags.description: NV Medicaid FFS requires sleep questionnaire for auth submission. This is the ONLY payer that mandates it.
flags.human_action: If chart notes do not meet clinical criteria for testing, call patient for sleep questionnaire (Epworth/STOP-BANG) before submitting auth.

flags.description: Referring provider is out of state.
flags.human_action: Check if payer allows out-of-state referrals (NV Medicaid = blocker).

flags.description: Payer derived from member ID format pattern (e.g., 3-letter alpha prefix = BCBS, MBI pattern = Medicare, H-prefix = Humana) because payer name was not recognized. Lower confidence than name-based identification.
flags.human_action: Confirm payer identity during benefits verification. Format-derived identification may be incorrect if ID format overlaps between payers.

flags.description: PSG recommended due to comorbidities (soft recommendation).
flags.human_action: Note recommendation. If physician ordered HST, can still proceed.

flags.description: Prior study needed for titration eligibility.
flags.human_action: Request prior diagnostic results.

flags.description: BCBS prefix rules may have changed.
flags.human_action: Verify current auth requirements for this prefix.

flags.description: Signature date is old (>90 days or per payer rules).
flags.human_action: Check payer requirements. May need updated/re-signed order.

flags.description: Mid-level provider (NP/PA) — supervising physician may be needed.
flags.human_action: Verify if supervising physician info is required for auth.

flags.description: Prior diagnostic study is aging. Titration validity depends on circumstances — review context.
flags.human_action: Review prior study date, reason for titration, and payer requirements. Hard stop at 5 years. Under 5 years is circumstantial based on clinical context.

flags.description: Timing issue with titration (too soon, expired, etc.).
flags.human_action: Review prior study date against payer retitration rules.

flags.description: UMR plan detected. HST should be prioritized unless clinical reason for in-lab. UMR HST reimbursement is $900 (much higher than other tests). Patient charged at HPN rates.
flags.human_action: Prioritize HST for this patient unless clinical contraindication. Bill patient at HPN rate ($334.04 HST), actual reimbursement = $900.

flags.description: Payer not found in insurance.json.
flags.human_action: Manually identify payer. Verify network status. Process with generic criteria.

flags.description: VA: must schedule within 1 week of referral.
flags.human_action: Prioritize scheduling. Track referral receipt date.

flags.description: VA: referral must be on file. Referral = authorization.
flags.human_action: Verify referral is received before scheduling.

flags.description: Aetna 12-digit ID detected. Could be Medicare Advantage (accepted) or Intermountain HMO (OON). Must verify before scheduling.
flags.human_action: Call Aetna to confirm plan type. If Medicare → proceed. If Intermountain/CVS HMO → STOP_OON, fax UTS.

flags.description: Aetna Supplement ID does not start with 3 letters. Expected format: 3 letters (often CLI) followed by numbers.
flags.human_action: Verify policy number with patient. Confirm this is a supplement plan.

flags.description: Auth requirement uncertain — verify during benefits call.
flags.human_action: Confirm auth requirements when calling for benefits.

flags.description: GEHA ID does not start with G. All GEHA IDs should be G followed by numbers.
flags.human_action: Verify ID with patient. Confirm payer is GEHA.

flags.description: Humana ID does not start with H. May be wrong payer, Medicaid line, or OCR misread.
flags.human_action: Verify ID with patient. Check if this is actually a Humana Medicaid (use Medicaid ID instead) or a different payer.

flags.description: LV Firefighters UHSS ID does not start with 800. Expected format: 800 followed by numbers.
flags.human_action: Verify ID with patient. Confirm this is the UHSS plan.

flags.description: HST removed from scope (pediatric, NV Medicaid, O2, etc.).
flags.human_action: Review reasons. Consolidated from multiple flags per M6 dedup.

flags.description: Patient approaching age 10 (scheduling consideration — no code change).
flags.human_action: Note for scheduling. No CPT code change at age 10.

flags.description: Patient approaching age 18 (adult/pediatric boundary + HST eligibility).
flags.human_action: Confirm correct CPT code set and HST eligibility at test date. Under 18 = no HST.

flags.description: Patient approaching age 2 (testing eligibility boundary).
flags.human_action: Verify age at time of scheduled test.

flags.description: Patient approaching age 6 (pediatric code boundary).
flags.human_action: Check if 95782 or 95810 applies at test date.

flags.description: Patient has documented behavioral/mental health concern relevant to overnight stay.
flags.human_action: Brief tech. Consider staffing. Ensure calm environment. May need adjusted approach.

flags.description: ICD code is retired/invalid in current year.
flags.human_action: Find replacement code. Check icd10_master for successor.

flags.description: Patient has communication barrier (hearing loss, vision loss, speech disorder). May need interpreter or special accommodation.
flags.human_action: Arrange interpreter if needed. Written instructions for hearing impaired. Extra setup time.

flags.description: Need to contact patient/provider for insurance info.
flags.human_action: Reach out to collect insurance details.

flags.description: Insurance info partially extracted.
flags.human_action: Verify missing fields during benefits call.

flags.description: Patient has incontinence (urinary or fecal). Scheduling alert for room preparation.
flags.human_action: Prepare room with protective covers. Extra linens available. No clinical impact on testing.

flags.description: Patient notes indicate non-English primary language or language barrier.
flags.human_action: Arrange interpreter for setup/consent. Written materials in patient's language if available.

flags.description: Date of birth not extracted.
flags.human_action: Check document for DOB. Age-dependent logic may be affected.

flags.description: Payer identified but no member ID extracted from referral. Format validation skipped.
flags.human_action: Request member ID from patient or referring provider. Needed for eligibility check and auth submission.

flags.description: Provider NPI not extracted.
flags.human_action: Look up NPI via NPPES registry.

flags.description: No patient phone number, email, or address extracted from referral.
flags.human_action: Contact ordering physician office for patient contact info. Need at minimum a phone number for scheduling.

flags.description: Patient name not extracted.
flags.human_action: Check document for patient name.

flags.description: Provider name not extracted.
flags.human_action: Check document for provider name.

flags.description: Signature date not found.
flags.human_action: Check document. May affect stale order determination.

flags.description: Patient has documented airborne infectious disease (TB, COVID, viral pneumonia). PPE required.
flags.human_action: N95 mask + isolation room if available. Verify disease is inactive/treated before scheduling. If active → defer testing.

flags.description: Patient has documented bloodborne pathogen (HIV, Hep B, Hep C). PPE required.
flags.human_action: Standard + enhanced PPE. Gloves mandatory for all contact. Sharps precautions. No impact on testing eligibility.

flags.description: Patient has documented contact-precaution infection (MRSA, shingles, fungal). PPE required.
flags.human_action: Gown + gloves for contact. Enhanced room cleaning after study. No impact on testing eligibility.

flags.description: Patient has PTSD. Scheduling alert for tech approach and environment.
flags.human_action: Brief tech on PTSD awareness. Calm environment. May need extra time for hookup. May startle easily.

flags.description: Patient has seizure disorder/epilepsy. Scheduling alert for sleep tech safety awareness.
flags.human_action: Ensure tech is aware. Prepare for possible seizure during study. Emergency protocol readily available.

flags.description: Patient will turn 10 near test date.
flags.human_action: Note for scheduling. No CPT code change at age 10.

flags.description: Patient will turn 18 near test date.
flags.human_action: Confirm correct CPT code set and HST eligibility at test date. Under 18 = no HST.

flags.description: Patient will turn 2 near test date.
flags.human_action: Same as ALERT_2.

flags.description: Patient will turn 6 near test date.
flags.human_action: Same as ALERT_6.

flags.description: Patient has documented violent behavior or aggression disorder. Critical safety alert.
flags.human_action: Staff safety precaution. Consider scheduling when additional staff available. Brief all staff.

flags.description: UHC ID is 12 digits starting with 771/777 — likely a Surest plan. Surest may have different auth/network rules than standard UHC.
flags.human_action: Verify plan is Surest during benefits call. Confirm auth requirements.

flags.description: Cost estimate is baseline, not payer-verified.
flags.human_action: Confirm actual cost during benefits verification.

flags.description: CPAP-related information detected in clinical notes. Context carried through for output assessment.
flags.human_action: Review CPAP details in output — usage history, compliance, pressure settings, issues reported.

flags.description: Infectious disease ICD code detected — PPE needed.
flags.human_action: Flag for staff safety. PPE required for in-lab study.

flags.description: Blood pressure medication detected in notes. Indicates cardiovascular comorbidity relevant to sleep apnea.
flags.human_action: Informational. Cardiovascular comorbidity documented. Supports clinical justification.

flags.description: Psychiatric/sleep medication detected (antidepressant, anxiolytic, sleep aid). Relevant to sleep study interpretation.
flags.human_action: Informational. Document for tech and interpreting physician. May affect sleep architecture.

flags.description: OCR confidence 85-89%. Proceed but note for review.
flags.human_action: Quick visual check of key fields.

flags.description: Patient may already be in system.
flags.human_action: Check for existing record before creating new.

flags.description: Active respiratory infection noted.
flags.human_action: May need to delay testing. Flag for scheduling.

flags.description: Meritain Health: must call payer before submitting auth. Meritain requires verbal notification prior to formal auth submission.
flags.human_action: Call Meritain at number on member card BEFORE submitting auth online. Document call reference number.

flags.description: Nevada Medicaid FFS does not cover home sleep testing (HST). Only in-lab PSG (95810/95811) is covered.
flags.human_action: Do NOT order HST/G0399 for NV Medicaid FFS patients. Schedule in-lab PSG only. If physician ordered HST, contact for in-lab order.

flags.description: UMR plan detected. Network status varies by underlying employer plan. Must verify facility is in-network before proceeding.
flags.human_action: Call UMR or check portal to verify network status for this specific plan. UMR is a TPA — network depends on employer's chosen network.

flags.description: Carrier is on the do-not-accept list (out of network). Auto-flagged as OON.
flags.human_action: Do NOT schedule. Fax Unable to Schedule (UTS) letter to referring provider. Patient must use in-network facility.

flags.description: BCBS plan routing unverified. Prefix not confirmed as Carelon — using Carelon criteria as conservative default.
flags.human_action: Look up prefix in bcbs_prefix_database.json. If not found, call BCBS member services to verify auth requirements and plan routing.

flags.description: UHC Medicare Optum plan detected. Optum is an IPA — referrals may be mislabeled as standard UHC.
flags.human_action: Verify plan is Optum-managed. Check if referral was sent to correct entity. Auth goes through Curo portal, NOT Evicore.

flags.description: Optum-managed UHC Medicare: auth must go through Curo portal, NOT uhcprovider.com or Evicore.
flags.human_action: Submit auth via Curo (curo.optum.com). Check benefits via providers.optumcaremw.com. Do NOT use uhcprovider.com for auth.

flags.description: UHC Surest plan detected. Copay varies by ZIP code — portal displays incorrect copay amount.
flags.human_action: Do NOT quote copay from UHC portal. Call or message UHC for accurate Surest copay specific to patient's ZIP code.
